The above explanation would be sufficient to explode the
myth that outer space and planets have no influence on human
beings. In fact earthly beings are the products of solar and
cosmic radiations. It is these radiations that sustain the dis-
carnate spirit while moving in space as well as during its stay
and development in the mother's womb. Accordingly the
